Class Auth

java.lang.Object
controller.Auth
public class Auth extends Object
Authentication controller class that handles user registration, login, and user retrieval operations. This class interacts with the UserDatabase to perform CRUD operations on User objects.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Method
    Description
    static User
    findUser(String username)
    Finds and retrieves a User object based on the provided username.
    static int

    Authenticates a user by checking their username and password against stored credentials.
    static boolean
    registerUser(User newUser)
    Registers a new user in the system if the username is not already taken.

  • Constructor Details

    • Auth

      public Auth()

  • Method Details

    • registerUser

      public static boolean registerUser(User newUser)
      Registers a new user in the system if the username is not already taken.
      Parameters:
      newUser - The User object containing the details of the new user to be registered
      Returns:
      true if registration is successful, false if the username already exists

    • login

      public static int login(String username, String password)
      Authenticates a user by checking their username and password against stored credentials.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the user attempting to log in
      password - The password provided by the user for authentication
      Returns:
      0 if the username doesn't exist, 1 if the username exists but password is incorrect, 2 if login is successful (username and password match)

    • findUser

      public static User findUser(String username)
      Finds and retrieves a User object based on the provided username.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the user to be found
      Returns:
      The User object if found, null if no user with the given username exists
